typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	var_code_file_name as string (),
	var_code_full_path as string (),
	CST_CERNER_Environment as string (),
	FileShare_AnalystFolder as string ()
}

source(output(
		code_list_id as string,
		code_list_description as string,
		mh_location_display as string,
		mh_location_code_value as string,
		cst_location_display as string,
		cst_location_code_value as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> fphnurseunitsourcecodelist	source(output(
		code_list_id as string,
		code_list_description as string,
		mh_location_display as string,
		mh_location_code_value as string,
		cst_location_display as string,
		cst_location_code_value as string,
		mh_room_display as string,
		cst_room_display as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> fphroomsourcecodelist
fphnurseunitsourcecodelist,fphroomsourcecodelist union(byName: true) ~> UnionAll
UnionAll derive({Copy of cst_location_display} = toString(cst_location_display),
		{Copy of mh_location_code_value} = toInteger(mh_location_code_value),
		{Copy of code_list_description} = toString(code_list_description),
		{Copy of mh_location_display} = toString(mh_location_display),
		{Copy of cst_room_display} = toString(cst_room_display),
		{Copy of mh_room_display} = toString(mh_room_display),
		{Copy of code_list_id} = toString(code_list_id),
		{Copy of cst_location_code_value} = toLong(cst_location_code_value)) ~> DataConversion
DataConversion sink(input(
		cst_room_display as string,
		cst_location_display as string,
		mh_room_display as string,
		cst_location_code_value as long,
		mh_location_display as string,
		mh_location_code_value as integer,
		code_list_id as string,
		code_list_description as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		cst_room_display = {Copy of cst_room_display},
		cst_location_display = {Copy of cst_location_display},
		mh_room_display = {Copy of mh_room_display},
		cst_location_code_value = {Copy of cst_location_code_value},
		mh_location_display = {Copy of mh_location_display},
		mh_location_code_value = {Copy of mh_location_code_value},
		code_list_id = {Copy of code_list_id},
		code_list_description = {Copy of code_list_description})) ~> xdsbrgcstmhcodemapping
